SM_and_M_Theory_generalisation_hadron_ge.extracted_from_pdf_text_lines: Section 6, Hadron Masses and Binding Energy
SM_and_M_Theory_generalisation_hadron_ge.excerpt_summary: Baryons and mesons are constructed from quark F_ij values via a geometric-mean prescription F_hadron = product(F_qi,qj)^(1/Npairs).
SM_and_M_Theory_generalisation_hadron_ge.risk: No independent MeV scale is shown in the same table.

SM_and_M_Theory_generalisation_exact_bar.excerpt_summary: Table lists Proton 938.3 vs 938.3, Neutron 939.6 vs 939.6, Lambda 1115.7 vs 1115.7, Sigma+ 1189.4 vs 1189.4 with 0.0% errors.
SM_and_M_Theory_generalisation_exact_bar.risk: Exact equality to displayed benchmark precision requires executable provenance before promotion.

Formal_SM_baryon_binding_formula.excerpt_summary: Formula m_B = sum_i m_i^(phys) + E_bind, where E_bind is emergent binding energy from topological interactions.
Formal_SM_baryon_binding_formula.risk: E_bind values appear tabular and need independent derivation.

Formal_SM_baryon_table_mixed_quality.excerpt_summary: Proton/neutron/Sigma/Xi close; Lambda deviates strongly, suggesting additional dynamics or SU(3)-breaking corrections.
Formal_SM_baryon_table_mixed_quality.risk: Not an exact universal closure; shows real residuals and missing dynamics.

Calabi_Yau2_binding_calibration_warning.excerpt_summary: Binding energy scale 5-50 MeV for light quarks; meson beta calibrated to PDG masses; compare to PDG and iterate small adjustment of F_ij if needed.
Calabi_Yau2_binding_calibration_warning.risk: Explicit calibration/iteration language blocks no-parameter promotion.

Perfect_numbers_prime_product_path.excerpt_summary: Hadron mapped to product of quark primes; for proton u↔3,d↔5, n_p=45, sigma(45)=78, R(45)=1.73; mismatch acknowledged and harmonic corrections required.
Perfect_numbers_prime_product_path.risk: No final MeV-scale map from R(n)/L(n) to hadron masses is completed there.

Sigma_standing_wave_binding.excerpt_summary: Hadron binding described via standing waves/knot topology and emergent Collatz/Lambda0 energy; tables contain physical baryon rows.
Sigma_standing_wave_binding.risk: Binding energy scale still needs provenance separate from table values.
